title: dendrostellera lessertii
intro: Dendrostellera lessertii, also known as Tibetan winter cherry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Compositae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dendrostellii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Dendrostellera lessertii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
